prompt_text:
### Demographics: 63-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 10 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after ophthalmology referral for suspected retinopathy
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis); HF (No); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~18.8 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Insulin Degludec 15units once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 85.1 kg; Height 180.9 cm; BMI 26.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 141/84 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.7%; 9 months ago 8.7%; 6 months ago 9.2%; 3 months ago 9.0%; current 9.8%), FPG (12 months ago 242mg/dL; 9 months ago 222mg/dL; 6 months ago 235mg/dL; 3 months ago 193mg/dL; current 211mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 83.9kg; 9 months ago 84.7kg; 6 months ago 80.9kg; 3 months ago 80.7kg; current 85.1kg), Height (12 months ago 180.9cm; 9 months ago 180.9cm; 6 months ago 180.9cm; 3 months ago 180.9cm; current 180.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 26.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 144mmHg; 9 months ago 141mmHg; 6 months ago 143mmHg; 3 months ago 143mmHg; current 141mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 86mmHg; 9 months ago 82mmHg; 6 months ago 83mmHg; 3 months ago 84mmHg; current 84mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 51U/L; 9 months ago 51U/L; 6 months ago 53U/L; 3 months ago 52U/L; current 58U/L), AST (12 months ago 69U/L; 9 months ago 71U/L; 6 months ago 62U/L; 3 months ago 63U/L; current 69U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.2mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 6.7mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 5.4mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 3.8mL/min/1.73m²; current 3mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 390mg/g; 9 months ago 574mg/g; 6 months ago 459mg/g; 3 months ago 659mg/g; current 600mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 90mg/dL; 9 months ago 95mg/dL; 6 months ago 90mg/dL; 3 months ago 90mg/dL; current 93mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 52mg/dL; 9 months ago 54mg/dL; 6 months ago 54mg/dL; 3 months ago 55mg/dL; current 53mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 143mg/dL; 9 months ago 146mg/dL; 6 months ago 127mg/dL; 3 months ago 130mg/dL; current 138mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.2g/dL; 6 months ago 10.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.8g/dL; current 9.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
